subcodes.title: Public address given on 1913-04-12
subcodes.first_line: O Thou compassionate Lord! Illumine these hearts with the light of the Most Great Guidance! Confer life upon these spirits through thy divine glad tidings!
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @The Holy Spirit, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @spiritual transformation, @mindfulness; concentration; focus
